name: 400 MG Imatinib Tablets IP
about: 400 MG Imatinib Tablets IP are a type of general medicine used to treat certain types of cancer and blood diseases. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets with a dosage of 400mg. The medicine should be stored in a cool and dry place. The origin of medicine is India, where it is manufactured with high-quality standards. The dosage guidelines for the medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion.
